enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs on Thanksgiving morning about his ongoing project tracing Rome in detail for a map or game, discussing his progress and motivation strategy. He mentions listening to a podcast about Roman history, plans to visit his mom for Thanksgiving dinner with his brother and a friend, and notes he is unusually sober for this video.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: push hard past 50-75% completion so returning to it feels motivating rather than daunting
best absorbed gradually over time by collecting small memorable tidbits
hesitant to go because he is too absorbed in his work
